user_query: I want to obtain historical exchange rates for USD, EUR, and JPY on January 1, 2015, using EUR as the base currency.

TaskList.description: Query the historical exchange rates for EUR on January 1, 2015.
Based on the obtained EUR exchange rate, query the historical exchange rate for USD against EUR on January 1, 2015.
Based on the obtained EUR exchange rate, query the historical exchange rate for JPY against EUR on January 1, 2015.
